canonical_fast_path.file_type: git repository with CSV benchmark tables
canonical_fast_path.notes: Fastest way to acquire all nine canonical on-target datasets in benchmark-ready CSV form.

deep_spcas9.notes: Supplement gives processed training table; SRA is raw sequencing only.

crispron.notes: Repo contains weights, not raw training CSV.

crispor_effdata.notes: Useful extended on-target suite for secondary evidence.

cclmoff_compiled.notes: Primary modern off-target source of record for compiled multi-assay benchmark. File name 09212024_CCLMoff_dataset.csv, size 714692329 bytes, MD5 2a9be5c69a89c8eee3fdef0c03efae3a.

guideseq_pipeline.file_type: pipeline repo plus legacy CSV mirror
guideseq_pipeline.notes: Legacy mirror is convenience only, not source of record.

circleseq_pipeline.file_type: pipeline repo plus legacy CSV mirror
circleseq_pipeline.notes: Legacy mirror is convenience only, not source of record.

changeseq.file_type: GEO raw archive plus processing repo
changeseq.notes: Processed site tables still require extraction from supplement or reconstruction via pipeline.

legacy_faststart_bundle.file_type: encoded pickle bundle and git mirror
legacy_faststart_bundle.notes: Useful for fast iteration but not equivalent to the modern primary canonical off-target suite.
